title: Fix Shopping List Structure
description: Correct the HTML structure by replacing generic tags with proper semantic list tags.
initialHtml:
Milk
Bread
Eggs
changesToBeDone: Replace the container <div> with a <ul> element.
Replace each <span> item with an <li> element.
Keep the text values exactly as 'Milk', 'Bread', and 'Eggs'.

rules.errorMessage: The shopping list container should not use a <div> tag.
Expected exactly 3 list items inside the shopping list.
The first list item must be 'Milk'.
The second list item must be 'Bread'.
The third list item must be 'Eggs'.

title: Update Array Correctly
description: Modify the JavaScript code so that a new value is successfully added to the array and displayed in the console.
initialHtml: Check the Console Logs below
changesToBeDone: Create an array called 'fruits' containing 'Apple' and 'Banana'.
Add 'Orange' to the array using the correct array method.
Log the updated array length to the console.
Ensure the Console Logs output shows '3'.

rules.errorMessage: Your code produced runtime errors. Fix all console errors.
Use the '.push()' method to add a new item to the array.
The Console Logs output must contain the updated array length '3'.

title: Simple Todo List
description: Create a simple todo list app where users can add tasks dynamically using JavaScript.
initialHtml: My Todo List
changesToBeDone: Add an input field with id 'todo-input'.
Add a button with id 'add-task-btn' and text 'Add Task'.
Add an unordered list with id 'todo-list'.
In app.js, add functionality to append a new <li> item when the button is clicked.
Center the app layout using CSS.

rules.errorMessage: The button text must be exactly 'Add Task'.
The input field should accept the task text correctly.
Clicking the add button should append the task to the todo list.
